results.title: BAN vs AUS, 1st ODI 2026: Squad, Match Date, Time, Venue & Schedule, Australia tour of Bangladesh 2026
results.description: Get the Australia tour of Bangladesh 2026 official schedule of 1st ODI! Check Bangladesh vs Australia 1st ODI match timings 2:00 PM (Local), (1:30 PM IST), squad, players list, and venue (Shere Bangla National Stadium, Dhaka) details. Stay updated with IndiaCricketSchedule.com for latest match details. Bangladesh vs Australia, 1st ODI, Australia tour of Bangladesh 2026 - Bangladesh Cricket team will play 1st ODI of 3 ODIs matches of Australia tour of Bangladesh 2026 Series against Australia Cricket Team , where the 1st ODI will be played on Tuesday, June 09, 2026. The BAN vs AUS, 1st ODI match will be played at Shere Bangla National Stadium, Dhaka, and will get started at 8:00 AM GMT, and 2:00 PM Local. The toss of the match will be done 30 minutes before the start of the match at 1:30 PM Local. The Bangladesh cricket team will be captained by Mehidy Hasan Miraz in the match and the Australia cricket team will be captained by Josh Inglis. Here are the full details of the Bangladesh vs Australia, 1st ODI 2026 Match Schedule and Timing, Captain and Players List. Australia vs Bangladesh Key Head-to-Head ODI Facts ODIs: Australia has won 20 of 22 matches nearly every encounter, with Bangladesh's sole ODI victory occurring in 2005 at Cardiff. results.title: Game Volt presents new collection of supercharged funfair attractions
results.description: Game Volt, the product division of CONDUCTR, the UK-based innovation studio , has introduced Carnival Games, a new set of supercharged funfair attractions designed to help operators capitalise on the growing trend of competitive socialising and carnival-themed entertainment. The launch occurs as modern midway concepts continue to gain popularity in the industry. Although operators have observed the success of these experiences, they have limited options to incorporate similar attractions into their own venues. Carnival Games: The Supercharged Funfair was created to fill that gap. Traditional gameplay, modern tech Carnival Games, built on Game Volt's technology, modernises traditional physical gameplay by incorporating smart personalisation, dynamic game mechanics, and integrated competition features that aim to keep players engaged for longer. The system acknowledges achievements, highlights key moments through live action replay, and responds to guest interactions, making experiences more engaging and rewarding. Operators can set up tournaments, team competitions, and group challenges to promote repeat participation and increase dwell time, particularly for corporate groups. Canival Games enhance traditional physical gameplay through smart personalisation, dynamic mechanics, and integrated competition Image courtesy of Game Volt Carnival Games is a ready-to-use solution that features booking integrations, scoring APIs, venue customisation options, and ongoing support. The collection now offers up to 16 games, enabling operators to develop anything from a single attraction to an entire midway, with additional games and experiences already in the pipeline. Designed for operators and players Matt Daly , head of partnerships at Game Volt, says: "We've spent a lot of time looking at what makes modern fairground attractions successful. Rather than reinventing the wheel, we've taken the best bits, evolved them using technology and built something that works for operators as well as players. "The category has already proven itself. Guests love these experiences, and operators can see the value they bring. The Supercharged Funfair gives venues access to that opportunity in a format that's flexible, re-themable and modular.” The first installations of Game Volt's Carnival Games are currently in production and are set to launch in 2027. Made in the North West of England, Carnival Games is part of a product line installed in over 250 locations worldwide, backed by an experienced team and reliable technology. Attendees at this week's IAAPA Expo Asia in Hong Kong can meet the team behind CONDUCTR and Game Volt. Last month, CONDUCTR also announced that it has been selected to create a new immersive media experience for Land’s End and The Needles in the UK.

results.title: Odisha Tops India in Skill Competition with 57 Medals, Says CM Mohan Majhi
results.description: #ସ ୍କିଲ_ପ୍ରତିଯୋଗିତାରେ_ଓଡ଼ିଶା_ଶୀର୍ଷରେ ମୋଦି ସରକାର କେନ୍ଦ୍ରରେ ୧୨ ବର୍ଷ ପୂରଣ କରିବା ଅବସରରେ ଅଭିଭାଷଣ ପ୍ରଦାନ କରିଛନ୍ତି ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ମୋହନ ମାଝୀ। ଅମୃତ ୨.୦ ଯୋଜନାରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ସାରା ଦେଶରେ ପ୍ରଥମ ସ୍ଥାନ ଅଧିକାର କରିଛି। ଇଣ୍ଡିଆ ସ୍କିଲ ପ୍ରତିଯୋଗିତାରେ ଓଡ଼ିଶା ୫୭ଟି ପଦକ ସହ ଦେଶରେ ଶୀର୍ଷ ସ୍ଥାନ ଅଧିକାର କରିଛି ବୋଲି କହିଛନ୍ତି ମୁଖ୍ୟମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ। On the occasion of the completion of 12 years of the Central Government led by Prime Minister Narendra Modi, Odisha Chief Minister Mohan Charan Majhi addressed a public programme highlighting key achievements. He stated that Odisha has secured the top position in the country under the Amrit 2.0 scheme. The Chief Minister further informed that Odisha has achieved remarkable success in the India Skill Competition by winning a total of 57 medals, ranking first in the nation. He said these achievements reflect the state’s growing focus on skill development and effective implementation of welfare programmes. #OdishaSkills #IndiaSkillCompetition #OdishaTops #MohanCharanMajhi #NarendraModi #SkillDevelopment #AmritMission #OdishaNews #BreakingNews #OdishaTV #OTV For latest news updates follow us on WhatsApp: https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VaYNIW78qIzrtKKZiD3M OdishaTV is Odisha's no 1 News Channel. results.title: My father’s dream : Manav Suthar on emotional India Test debut
results.description: New Chandigarh : Left-arm spinner Manav Suthar has described his Test debut for India as a deeply emotional and long-cherished moment, calling it the fulfilment of a dream that he and his family had nurtured since the beginning of his cricketing journey. Suthar made his debut in the one-off Test against Afghanistan in New Chandigarh, [...] The post My father’s dream : Manav Suthar on emotional India Test debut appeared first on KalingaTV .
